name: Brushing & Linking (Highlight)
description: Selecting data in one view highlights corresponding data in all linked views.
condition: Multiple views share same data schema

implementation.reset: click outside brush area → restore all to 100%

visual_rules: Use consistent 'Selection Color' across all views (e.g., bright orange/blue)
Preserve spatial position of unselected items for context

name: Cross-Filtering (Bidirectional)
description: Brushing a histogram aggregate simultaneously filters the main scatterplot/map AND updates other histograms.
condition: Multi-dimensional dataset with multiple coordinated views

implementation.display: Show 'Global' (background, gray) and 'Local' (foreground, colored) distributions simultaneously
implementation.boolean_logic: AND intersection of all active brushes

name: Drill-Down (Unidirectional)
description: Clicking on a category in an overview view filters a detail view to show only that category's data.

implementation.mechanism: On click → filter detail data → animate enter/exit via selection.join()

name: Focus + Context (Spatial)
description: A miniature overview shows the full dataset while the main view shows a zoomed-in detail area.
condition: Large spatial or temporal dataset with viewport constraints

implementation.context: miniature view (height < 20% of main) with d3.brushX controlling focus x.domain
implementation.minimap: overview rectangle indicating current viewport position

name: Spatial-Statistical Linking
description: Map pan/zoom dynamically filters linked statistical charts to show data for visible features only.

implementation.mechanism: On map viewport change → compute visible features → update chart data
implementation.display: Chart always reflects the geographic region currently in view

name: Shared Scale Synchronization
description: Multiple views sharing the same data axis keep their scales synchronized during zoom/pan.

implementation.mechanism: d3.dispatch event synchronizes domain changes across all matching scales
